calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, American Express Bank, FSB, A Federal Savings Bank,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Evan M. Becker, an individual; BOXCABCO, a California Corporation, DBA Box Cabinetry Co.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $44,390.86
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $602.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $44,993.36

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-05-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Continued To Jun-08-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
